titlestmt.titleproper: New York State Wine Grape Growers records6714
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Evan Fay Earle

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-11-30 23:22:57 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State Wine Grape Growers records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State Wine Grape Growers

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Financial Records, Printed Materials, Research Materials
did.abstract: Records document the activities of the organization. Other items include, member files, grape prices, news items, legislation that pertains to the wine and grape, correspondence with legislators, marketing, Vinefresh, annual meeting items, press releases, and newsletters. Also included are the files of Monty Stamp as secretary to the organization these have meeting minutes, financial information, copies of mailings from the organization.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: New York Wine Grape Growers mission is to benefit in any way possible members and the New York grape industry.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records document the activities of the organization. Other items include, member files, grape prices, news items, legislation that pertains to the wine and grape, correspondence with legislators, marketing, Vinefresh, annual meeting items, press releases, and newsletters. Also included are the files of Monty Stamp as secretary to the organization these have meeting minutes, financial information, copies of mailings from the organization.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: See also collection #6695 Box 4 for some oversize items from NYWGG including advertising proofs for NY wine and grape campaigns.
See also Cornell Cooperative Extension Finger Lakes Grape Program records, #6773.
Forms part of the Eastern Wine and Grape Archive. (EWGA)

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State Wine Grape Growers records, #6714. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1983 does not appear to be in material given to Cornell.
